vibe: Cinematic, aggressive, elite athleticism, tech-infused high contrast

rules.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-normal uppercase tracking-tighter leading-[0.9]
rules.h2: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-normal uppercase tracking-tight leading-none

surfaces.glass_card: bg-white/[0.03] backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-3xl overflow-hidden
surfaces.glow_panel: relative before:absolute before:inset-0 before:-z-10 before:bg-[#FF2D2D]/20 before:blur-[100px]

components.navbar: Fixed z-50 top-0 left-0 right-0 h-24 flex items-center bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-2xl border-b border-white/10. Logo left, Desktop menu center (hidden on mobile), Sign Up right.
components.button_primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#FF2D2D] to-[#FF3B1F] text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-bold uppercase tracking-wide hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(255,45,45,0.4)] transition-all duration-300
components.button_secondary: bg-white/[0.05] border border-white/10 text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-bold uppercase tracking-wide hover:bg-white/[0.1] transition-all duration-300
components.hero_section: Min-h-screen relative flex items-center. Left side: Text content (50%). Right side: Absolute full-height visual bleeding off-edge with gradient mask to black on the left to ensure text readability.
components.bento_grid_item: bg-[#111111] border border-white/5 p-8 rounded-3xl flex flex-col justify-between group hover:border-[#FF2D2D]/50 transition-colors duration-500
components.pricing_card: bg-white/[0.02] border border-white/10 p-10 rounded-3xl relative overflow-hidden. Active/Pro tier gets border-[#FF2D2D] and subtle red inner glow.

hero.usage: Hero section right-side visual. Needs gradient overlay blending into black on the left.

about.usage: About section background or side image

instructions_to_main_agent.general: JK Fitness landing page. Build entirely in Tailwind + raw HTML divs. Do NOT use Shadcn Card components for the main layout; rely on custom divs with glassmorphism classes as defined in the guidelines.
instructions_to_main_agent.fonts: Import 'Anton' and 'Montserrat' from Google Fonts in index.css. Apply Anton to all H1/H2/H3 and Montserrat to body.
instructions_to_main_agent.hero_composition: Implement the split hero. Ensure the right-side image (`image_urls.hero`) stretches full height of the viewport, with a dark left-to-right gradient mask (`bg-gradient-to-r from-black via-black/50 to-transparent`) so the left-aligned text is readable.
instructions_to_main_agent.text_highlight: In the H1 'Stronger Every Day Starts Here', wrap 'Stronger' in a span with text-[#FF2D2D] color.
instructions_to_main_agent.bento_grid: For Services and Fitness Options, use the Tetris-style asymmetrical bento grids. Mix square shapes with tall rectangles, avoid perfect symmetry.
instructions_to_main_agent.data_testid: Ensure every button, link, and interactive form element has a specific kebab-case `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid='hero-signup-button'`).
instructions_to_main_agent.popup_form: The 'Get Started' contact popup needs to store leads in the backend database. Implement a custom Shadcn dialog with form inputs for Name, Email, Phone, combined with company details (email, phone, address).
instructions_to_main_agent.icons: Use lucide-react for all iconography (dumbbells, checkmarks, stars for reviews).
